title: Refactor SRP-039 (SRP): The IMutableRegistryHub interface is responsible for registering all types of...
apply_error: no patch blocks produced by LLM

detected_issue.description: The IMutableRegistryHub interface is responsible for registering all types of components within the Catch2 framework, including reporters, listeners, test cases, exception translators, tag aliases, and enum values.
detected_issue.reasoning: This interface combines the management of multiple distinct registries. Changes to how any specific component type is registered (e.g., reporters vs. exception translators) would necessitate altering this single interface, violating SRP. It should be broken down into more specific registry interfaces.
